item.title: Tech Equity Sales Renew AI Debt-Binge Worries
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: SMBC’s asset management arm hired Heng Cheam as head of capital formation, as the financier continues to grow its private markets presence across Asia Pacific. Cheam was formerly with the Asia Pacific private credit team of DWS Group, the asset management arm of Deutsche Bank, which was disbanded last year.

item.title: Diversity of PE investments on f display across key sectors full
item.author: The Scotsman
item.description: Audax Private Equity 2 H2 Equity Partners 2 Intermediate Capital Group (ICG) 2 LDC 2 Silverlake 2 SCF Partners 2 Abry Partners 1 Amberjack Capital Partners 1 Ares Management 1 Ariel Alternatives 1 CapVest Partners 1 Cascade 1 Certares Management LLC 1 Certek Group Holdings Ltd 1 Chiltern Capital 1 Convent Capital 1 DBAY Advisors Acquisition 1 DWS Infrastructure 1 Clayton, Dubilier & Rice 1 EMK Capital 1
